verses.latin_vulgate: Onus Babylonis, quod vidit Isaias, filius Amos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשָּׂ֖א בָּבֶ֑ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר חָזָ֔ה יְשַֽׁעְיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־אָמֽוֹץ׃
verses.king_james: The burden of Babylon, which Isaiah the son of Amoz did see.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super montem caliginosum levate signum :  exaltate vocem,  levate manum,  et ingrediantur portas duces.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַ֤ל הַר־נִשְׁפֶּה֙ שְֽׂאוּ־נֵ֔ס הָרִ֥ימוּ ק֖וֹל לָהֶ֑ם הָנִ֣יפוּ יָ֔ד וְיָבֹ֖אוּ פִּתְחֵ֥י נְדִיבִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Lift ye up a banner upon the high mountain, exalt the voice unto them, shake the hand, that they may go into the gates of the nobles.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego mandavi sanctificatis meis,  et vocavi fortes meos in ira mea,  exsultantes in gloria mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִ֥י צִוֵּ֖יתִי לִמְקֻדָּשָׁ֑י גַּ֣ם קָרָ֤אתִי גִבּוֹרַי֙ לְאַפִּ֔י עַלִּיזֵ֖י גַּאֲוָתִֽי׃
verses.king_james: I have commanded my sanctified ones, I have also called my mighty ones for mine anger, even them that rejoice in my highness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox multitudinis in montibus,  quasi populorum frequentium ;  vox sonitus regum,  gentium congregatarum.  Dominus exercituum præcepit  militiæ belli,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֥וֹל הָמ֛וֹן בֶּהָרִ֖ים דְּמ֣וּת עַם־רָ֑ב ק֠וֹל שְׁא֞וֹן מַמְלְכ֤וֹת גּוֹיִם֙ נֶאֱסָפִ֔ים יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת מְפַקֵּ֖ד צְבָ֥א מִלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The noise of a multitude in the mountains, like as of a great people; a tumultuous noise of the kingdoms of nations gathered together: the Lord of hosts mustereth the host of the battle.

verses.latin_vulgate: venientibus de terra procul,  a summitate cæli ;  Dominus, et vasa furoris ejus,  ut disperdat omnem terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּאִ֛ים מֵאֶ֥רֶץ מֶרְחָ֖ק מִקְצֵ֣ה הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם יְהֹוָה֙ וּכְלֵ֣י זַעְמ֔וֹ לְחַבֵּ֖ל כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: They come from a far country, from the end of heaven, even the Lord, and the weapons of his indignation, to destroy the whole land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ululate, quia prope est dies Domini ;  quasi vastitas a Domino veniet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵילִ֕ילוּ כִּ֥י קָר֖וֹב י֣וֹם יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּשֹׁ֖ד מִשַּׁדַּ֥י יָבֽוֹא׃
verses.king_james: Howl ye; for the day of the Lord is at hand; it shall come as a destruction from the Almighty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc omnes manus dissolventur,  et omne cor hominis contabescet,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֖ן כׇּל־יָדַ֣יִם תִּרְפֶּ֑ינָה וְכׇל־לְבַ֥ב אֱנ֖וֹשׁ יִמָּֽס׃
verses.king_james: Therefore shall all hands be faint, and every man’s heart shall melt:

verses.latin_vulgate: et conteretur.  Torsiones et dolores tenebunt ;  quasi parturiens dolebunt :  unusquisque ad proximum suum stupebit,  facies combustæ vultus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽנִבְהָ֓לוּ ׀ צִירִ֤ים וַחֲבָלִים֙ יֹֽאחֵז֔וּן כַּיּוֹלֵדָ֖ה יְחִיל֑וּן אִ֤ישׁ אֶל־רֵעֵ֙הוּ֙ יִתְמָ֔הוּ פְּנֵ֥י לְהָבִ֖ים פְּנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And they shall be afraid: pangs and sorrows shall take hold of them; they shall be in pain as a woman that travaileth: they shall be amazed one at another; their faces shall be as flames.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce dies Domini veniet,  crudelis, et indignationis plenus, et iræ, furorisque,  ad ponendam terram in solitudinem,  et peccatores ejus conterendos de ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֤ה יוֹם־יְהֹוָה֙ בָּ֔א אַכְזָרִ֥י וְעֶבְרָ֖ה וַחֲר֣וֹן אָ֑ף לָשׂ֤וּם הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ לְשַׁמָּ֔ה וְחַטָּאֶ֖יהָ יַשְׁמִ֥יד מִמֶּֽנָּה׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the day of the Lord cometh, cruel both with wrath and fierce anger, to lay the land desolate: and he shall destroy the sinners thereof out of it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam stellæ cæli, et splendor earum,  non expandent lumen suum ;  obtenebratus est sol in ortu suo,  et luna non splendebit in lumine suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־כוֹכְבֵ֤י הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ וּכְסִ֣ילֵיהֶ֔ם לֹ֥א יָהֵ֖לּוּ אוֹרָ֑ם חָשַׁ֤ךְ הַשֶּׁ֙מֶשׁ֙ בְּצֵאת֔וֹ וְיָרֵ֖חַ לֹא־יַגִּ֥יהַּ אוֹרֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For the stars of heaven and the constellations thereof shall not give their light: the sun shall be darkened in his going forth, and the moon shall not cause her light to shine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et visitabo super orbis mala,  et contra impios iniquitatem eorum ;  et quiescere faciam superbiam infidelium,  et arrogantiam fortium humiliabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָקַדְתִּ֤י עַל־תֵּבֵל֙ רָעָ֔ה וְעַל־רְשָׁעִ֖ים עֲוֺנָ֑ם וְהִשְׁבַּתִּי֙ גְּא֣וֹן זֵדִ֔ים וְגַאֲוַ֥ת עָרִיצִ֖ים אַשְׁפִּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: And I will punish the world for their evil, and the wicked for their iniquity; and I will cause the arrogancy of the proud to cease, and will lay low the haughtiness of the terrible.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pretiosior erit vir auro,  et homo mundo obrizo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹקִ֥יר אֱנ֖וֹשׁ מִפָּ֑ז וְאָדָ֖ם מִכֶּ֥תֶם אוֹפִֽיר׃
verses.king_james: I will make a man more precious than fine gold; even a man than the golden wedge of Ophir.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super hoc cælum turbabo ;  et movebitur terra de loco suo,  propter indignationem Domini exercituum,  et propter diem iræ furoris ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּן֙ שָׁמַ֣יִם אַרְגִּ֔יז וְתִרְעַ֥שׁ הָאָ֖רֶץ מִמְּקוֹמָ֑הּ בְּעֶבְרַת֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת וּבְי֖וֹם חֲר֥וֹן אַפּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore I will shake the heavens, and the earth shall remove out of her place, in the wrath of the Lord of hosts, and in the day of his fierce anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit quasi damula fugiens,  et quasi ovis, et non erit qui congreget.  Unusquisque ad populum suum convertetur,  et singuli ad terram suam fugient.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ כִּצְבִ֣י מֻדָּ֔ח וּכְצֹ֖אן וְאֵ֣ין מְקַבֵּ֑ץ אִ֤ישׁ אֶל־עַמּוֹ֙ יִפְנ֔וּ וְאִ֥ישׁ אֶל־אַרְצ֖וֹ יָנֽוּסוּ׃
verses.king_james: And it shall be as the chased roe, and as a sheep that no man taketh up: they shall every man turn to his own people, and flee every one into his own land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnis qui inventus fuerit occidetur,  et omnis qui supervenerit cadet in gladio ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־הַנִּמְצָ֖א יִדָּקֵ֑ר וְכׇל־הַנִּסְפֶּ֖ה יִפּ֥וֹל בֶּחָֽרֶב׃
verses.king_james: Every one that is found shall be thrust through; and every one that is joined unto them shall fall by the sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: infantes eorum allidentur in oculis eorum,  diripientur domus eorum, et uxores eorum violabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֹלְלֵיהֶ֥ם יְרֻטְּשׁ֖וּ לְעֵינֵיהֶ֑ם יִשַּׁ֙סּוּ֙ בָּתֵּיהֶ֔ם וּנְשֵׁיהֶ֖ם (תשגלנה) [תִּשָּׁכַֽבְנָה]׃
verses.king_james: Their children also shall be dashed to pieces before their eyes; their houses shall be spoiled, and their wives ravished.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce ego suscitabo super eos Medos,  qui argentum non quærant,  nec aurum velint ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנְנִ֛י מֵעִ֥יר עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם אֶת־מָדָ֑י אֲשֶׁר־כֶּ֙סֶף֙ לֹ֣א יַחְשֹׁ֔בוּ וְזָהָ֖ב לֹ֥א יַחְפְּצוּ־בֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Behold, I will stir up the Medes against them, which shall not regard silver; and as for gold, they shall not delight in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed sagittis parvulos interficient,  et lactantibus uteris non miserebuntur,  et super filios non parcet oculus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּקְשָׁת֖וֹת נְעָרִ֣ים תְּרַטַּ֑שְׁנָה וּפְרִי־בֶ֙טֶן֙ לֹ֣א יְרַחֵ֔מוּ עַל־בָּנִ֖ים לֹא־תָח֥וּס עֵינָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Their bows also shall dash the young men to pieces; and they shall have no pity on the fruit of the womb; their eye shall not spare children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit Babylon illa gloriosa in regnis,  inclyta superbia Chaldæorum,  sicut subvertit Dominus Sodomam et Gomorrham.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיְתָ֤ה בָבֶל֙ צְבִ֣י מַמְלָכ֔וֹת תִּפְאֶ֖רֶת גְּא֣וֹן כַּשְׂדִּ֑ים כְּמַהְפֵּכַ֣ת אֱלֹהִ֔ים אֶת־סְדֹ֖ם וְאֶת־עֲמֹרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Babylon, the glory of kingdoms, the beauty of the Chaldees’ excellency, shall be as when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non habitabitur usque in finem,  et non fundabitur usque ad generationem et generationem ;  nec ponet ibi tentoria Arabs,  nec pastores requiescent ibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־תֵשֵׁ֣ב לָנֶ֔צַח וְלֹ֥א תִשְׁכֹּ֖ן עַד־דּ֣וֹר וָד֑וֹר וְלֹא־יַהֵ֥ל שָׁם֙ עֲרָבִ֔י וְרֹעִ֖ים לֹא־יַרְבִּ֥צוּ שָֽׁם׃
verses.king_james: It shall never be inhabited, neither shall it be dwelt in from generation to generation: neither shall the Arabian pitch tent there; neither shall the shepherds make their fold there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed requiescent ibi bestiæ,  et replebuntur domus eorum draconibus,  et habitabunt ibi struthiones,  et pilosi saltabunt ibi ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָבְצוּ־שָׁ֣ם צִיִּ֔ים וּמָלְא֥וּ בָתֵּיהֶ֖ם אֹחִ֑ים וְשָׁ֤כְנוּ שָׁם֙ בְּנ֣וֹת יַעֲנָ֔ה וּשְׂעִירִ֖ים יְרַקְּדוּ־שָֽׁם׃
verses.king_james: But wild beasts of the desert shall lie there; and their houses shall be full of doleful creatures; and owls shall dwell there, and satyrs shall dance there.

verses.latin_vulgate: et respondebunt ibi ululæ in ædibus ejus,  et sirenes in delubris voluptatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָנָ֤ה אִיִּים֙ בְּאַלְמְנוֹתָ֔יו וְתַנִּ֖ים בְּהֵ֣יכְלֵי עֹ֑נֶג וְקָר֤וֹב לָבוֹא֙ עִתָּ֔הּ וְיָמֶ֖יהָ לֹ֥א יִמָּשֵֽׁכוּ׃
verses.king_james: And the wild beasts of the islands shall cry in their desolate houses, and dragons in their pleasant palaces: and her time is near to come, and her days shall not be prolonged.
